title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 4.77%，the main contract closed 614.5. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10-30 yuan/mt fromlast Friday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand;today's overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
